OPENCTI_URL.description: The URL of the OpenCTI platform.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector in ISO-8601 format.

TIO_NUM_THREADS.description: Number of threads to use for the connector.

TIO_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for the Tenable API.

TIO_API_TIMEOUT.description: Timeout for API requests in seconds.

TIO_API_BACKOFF.description: Time in seconds to wait before retrying after receiving a 429 response from the API.

TIO_API_RETRIES.description: Number of retries in case of failure.

TIO_EXPORT_SINCE.description: Date from which to start pulling vulnerability data in ISO-8601 format.

TIO_MIN_SEVERITY.description: The minimum severity level of vulnerabilities to import.

TIO_MARKING_DEFINITION.description: Default TLP marking definition for imported data.
